framework.name: singapore_mgf
framework.description: IMDA Model AI Governance Framework — a voluntary best-practice framework for responsible AI in Singapore.

controls.name: mgf-1
controls.description: Clear roles and responsibilities for ethical deployment of AI.

controls.name: mgf-2
controls.description: Use a risk-impact matrix to determine appropriate level of human oversight.

controls.name: mgf-3
controls.description: Manage data quality, model robustness, reproducibility, and traceability.

controls.name: mgf-4
controls.description: Clear communication and disclosure of AI use to affected stakeholders.
